name: Defective Ladder Claims in Taylorsville

mainEntity.name: What if ladder was defective in my Taylorsville job fall?
mainEntity.text: What if ladder was defective in my Taylorsville job fall?

acceptedAnswer.text: File third-party product liability claim against manufacturer alongside workers' comp; no offset in Utah if comp paid first. Recover pain/suffering damages.

suggestedAnswer.text: Inspect ladder for defects (e.g., missing rungs); preserve evidence before employer discards. Taylorsville suits against brands like Louisville Ladder common. Comp lien applies to settlement—net recovery often higher. Coordinate claims carefully.

description: File third-party product liability claim against manufacturer alongside workers' comp; no offset in Utah if comp paid first. Recover pain/suffering damages.
